case_title: CACH, LLC VS. KEE WON CHUNG et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, KEE WON AN INDIVIDUAL
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHUNG, KEE WON AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-04-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE DEC-04-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUNG, KEE WON AN INDIVIDUAL $29,747.21 PRINCIPAL, $2,135.30 INTEREST, $510.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $32,392.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
